g.text: 2 N-S NICs (bonded, VLAN-trunked) · 8 E-W NICs (RoCE underlay, SR-IOV)
ESI-LAG pair (EVPN) — same LACP System ID
8 RoCE leaves — lossless fabric (PFC + ECN + DCQCN)
East-West RoCE underlay (8× 800GbE) — one NIC per GPU
SR-IOV: 16 VFs per PF (carved to pods via Multus)
Legend ■ blue=mgmt ■ yellow=storage ■ green=ingress ■ red=RoCE underlay ■ purple=GPU
Solid arrow = physical cable / kernel link. Dashed = GPU↔NIC PCIe/NUMA affinity (not a packet path).
